The '''Cargo Facility 2''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] manufactured by [[VenteX Construction Yards/Legends|VenteX Construction Yards]], a subsidiary of [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]]. A newer design, it superseded the [[Cargo Facility 1]], and was known for its robust structure and reliability.

{{Station-stub}}
